title: Alpha Particles - Trasparent Particles
description: Makes potion particles more subtle and transparent for a cleaner, sleek look.
body:
# Alpha Particles

Tired of overpowering, flashy particles cluttering your sreen? **Alpha Particles** makes all potion particle effects more subtle and transparent, giving your gameplay a cleaner, more elegant look.

![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa785f672ed1842941a206c9f8b399f09459fb7.jpeg)

Make your world feel smoother, lighter, and more “transparent” with Alpha Particles!
